text.title: Usability Testing Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: pre-launch mobile checkout v3 with two segments + three tasks + a severity-1 finding.

example.title: Scope + segments
example.p: Scope: mobile checkout v3 pre-launch validation. Segments: mid-market buyer (n=5), first-time buyer (n=5).

example.title: Tasks (scenario-based)
example.p: 1) "You decided to buy a gift card. Get it ready to email to your friend." Success: reaches confirmation.
2) "You realised your card on file is expired." Success: updates payment method.
3) "You want a refund for last week's order." Success: submits refund request.

example.title: Severity-1 finding
example.p: Observation (task-1): "Participants tap Pay twice when no loading state appears" — timestamps in 4/5 sessions. Inference: missing loading state causes double-submission. severity=1 (blocked AND ≥60%). human_reviewed=true.
